## Test plan

- [ ] `uv run ruff format .`

## Checklist

- [ ] Conventional Commit(s)
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md`, `docs/`, or examples) if needed
- [ ] No unrelated refactors
- [ ] Any breaking change is called out explicitly
